  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
  2. AbstractResourceHandle

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle.AbstractResourceHandle

Packages that use AbstractResourceHandle
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.resources.handle
Provides NetBeans-specific resource handles that bridge the IDE's Virtual File System (VFS) with the Anahata ASI resource model.

  • Uses of AbstractResourceHandle in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle

    Subclasses of AbstractResourceHandle in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PathHandle
    A filesystem-backed resource handle for physical local files.
    class 
    StringHandle
    A memory-backed resource handle for virtual or proposed content.
    class 
    UrlHandle
    A resource handle that points to a remote URL or a protocol-based entry.

  • Uses of AbstractResourceHandle in uno.anahata.asi.nb.resources.handle

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NbHandle
    A NetBeans-native resource handle that wraps a FileObject.
